summary: Completed comprehensive testing of server.py refactoring. All 22 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly. The refactoring from monolithic server.py (~3,228 lines) to modular files (database.py, models.py, auth.py, routes/*.py, services/*.py) was successful with no breaking changes.
passed_tests: API root endpoint returns correct response (message: 'The Room API', version: '1.0.0')
POST /api/auth/login with teacher@theroom.com/teacher123 - returns token and user info
POST /api/auth/login with member@theroom.com/member123 - returns token and user info
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials - returns 401
GET /api/auth/me - returns user info with id, email, name, role
GET /api/courses - returns course list with lesson_count, enrollment_count, is_enrolled
GET /api/courses/{id} - returns single course detail
GET /api/courses/{course_id}/lessons - returns lessons with resources and prompts
GET /api/lessons/{id} - returns single lesson detail
POST /api/lessons/{id}/complete - marks lesson complete
GET /api/search?q=gospel - returns search results (courses, lessons, discussions)
GET /api/search requires authentication (returns 401/403 without token)
GET /api/my-progress - returns progress with streak_days, total_lessons_completed
GET /api/teacher/student-progress - returns student list (teacher only)
GET /api/teacher/student-progress - returns 403 for member (correct)
GET /api/attendance/summary - returns attendance summary stats
GET /api/attendance/report - returns attendance report data
GET /api/push/vapid-public-key - returns VAPID public key
GET /api/reading-reminders/settings - returns reminder settings
GET /api/chat - returns chat messages
POST /api/chat - sends chat message successfully
GET /api/messages/inbox - returns private messages
GET /api/my-feedback - returns private feedback
Frontend: Login page loads with email/password inputs and demo login buttons
Frontend: Teacher login works and redirects to homepage
Frontend: Member login works and redirects to homepage
Frontend: Homepage loads with welcome message and 'Go to This Week's Lesson' button
Frontend: Navigation includes Home, Courses, Progress, Search, Chat, Messages links
Frontend: /courses page displays courses with thumbnails and enrollment info
Frontend: /progress page loads with Progress Dashboard and stats cards
Frontend: /search page loads with search input and empty state
Frontend: /settings page loads with Appearance (Light/Dark/System), Push Notifications, Daily Reading Reminders
Frontend: /attendance page loads for teacher with summary stats
Frontend: /chat page loads
Frontend: /messages page loads with Inbox
Frontend: Attendance link hidden for member (correct role-based access)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server.py refactoring validated successfully. The monolithic server.py (~3,228 lines) was split into: database.py (DB connection, config), models.py (Pydantic models), auth.py (auth routes and dependencies), routes/users.py, routes/courses.py, routes/lessons.py, routes/prompts.py, routes/social.py, routes/attendance.py, routes/video.py, routes/progress.py, routes/notifications.py, routes/seed.py, services/email_service.py, services/daily_service.py. All API endpoints work identically to before. Frontend unchanged and working correctly.

mocked_apis.Push notification browser subscription: Needs real browser HTTPS context - backend API works

modules_created: database.py - DB connection, JWT config, file upload config, Daily.co config, Resend config, VAPID config
models.py - All Pydantic models for auth, courses, lessons, prompts, comments, chat, resources, attendance, video, feedback, progress, push notifications
auth.py - Auth routes (/api/auth/*) and dependencies (get_current_user, require_approved, require_teacher)
routes/prompts.py - Teacher prompts, replies, private feedback
routes/notifications.py - Search, analytics, push notifications, reading reminders
